root_cause.summary: abstract_localized column is 202 GB; any query touching abstracts exceeds budget
details: _sanitize_regex sorted by length ASC (shortest first) — picked generic 4-letter words
CPC codes never applied in stage1 query — all US patents scanned
UNNEST cross-join on title_localized × abstract_localized multiplied row count
Single-query approach scanned 227-240 GB per run
